props.name: active
props.description: Toggle the active state for the component.

props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggle the disabled state for the component.

props.name: href
props.description: The href attribute specifies the URL of the page the link goes to.

props.name: shape
props.description: Select the shape of the component.

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small or large.

props.name: type
props.description:
Specifies the type of button. Always specify the type attribute for the `<button>` element.
Different browsers may use different default types for the `<button>` element.

props.name: variant
props.description: Set the button variant to an outlined button or a ghost button.

events.name: click
events.description: Event called when the user clicks on the button.
